title: Design history hook with API fetching and version retrieval
purpose: Manages design history state, fetches history from API, and provides version retrieval functionality.

steps.content: Initialize state for history, loading status, and error.
Extract project and session from the current session.
Set up a ref to track the current design ID for staleness checks.
Define a callback to fetch design history from the API.
Define a callback to retrieve a specific version of the design.
Set up an effect to fetch history when design ID changes.
Return the history state, loading status, error, refetch function, and version retrieval function.
If design ID, project, or session are missing, clear the history and return.
Set loading status to true and clear any existing error.
Fetch design history from the API using project, session, and design ID.
Check if the design ID is still current when the response arrives.
IF the response is null, set history to null.
ELSE update the history with the fetched data.
IF a network error occurs, set error message to 'Network error'.
IF the fetch is aborted, return without updating state.
IF the design ID is still current, clear loading status.
If design ID, project, or session are missing, return null.
Fetch a specific version of the design from the API using project, session, design ID, and timestamp.
IF version data is returned, extract and return the content.
IF an error occurs, ignore it and return null.
